claim: Fz/PCP-dependent Pk localizes to the anterior membrane of neuroectoderm cells during zebrafish neuralation

result.claim: Fz/PCP-dependent Pk localizes to the anterior membrane of neuroectoderm cells during zebrafish neuralation
result.reasoning: Despite multiple searches using various keywords related to Fz/PCP signaling, Prickle (Pk) localization, neuroectoderm, and zebrafish neurulation, no direct evidence was found to support or refute the claim. The search results primarily focused on the role of Vangl2 in planar cell polarity during zebrafish neurulation (Paper ID: 4423559) and other proteins in different biological contexts. There was no mention of Pk localizing to the anterior membrane of neuroectoderm cells in a Fz/PCP-dependent manner during zebrafish neurulation. Therefore, there is insufficient evidence in the knowledge base to verify the claim.

evidence.text: Activity-induced LTP at identified synapses between nociceptors and spinal neurons projecting to the periaqueductal grey (PAG) was completely abolished in SNS-PKG-I(-/-) mice.
evidence.source: Presynaptically Localized Cyclic GMP-Dependent Protein Kinase 1 Is a Key Determinant of Spinal Synaptic Potentiation and Pain Hypersensitivity

evidence.text: Serial multiphoton microscopy (MPM) was used to visualize the motility of podocytes and parietal epithelial cells (PECs) in vivo.
evidence.source: Tracking the fate of glomerular epithelial cells in vivo using serial multiphoton imaging in novel mouse models with fluorescent lineage tags

evidence.text: The interaction between nociceptors and spinal neurons projecting to the periaqueductal grey (PAG) was completely abolished in SNS-PKG-I(-/-) mice.
evidence.source: Presynaptically Localized Cyclic GMP-Dependent Protein Kinase 1 Is a Key Determinant of Spinal Synaptic Potentiation and Pain Hypersensitivity

evidence.text: Loss of zebrafish Vangl2 (in trilobite mutants) abolishes the polarization of neural keel cells.
evidence.source: Planar cell polarity signalling couples cell division and morphogenesis during neurulation

evidence.text: Protein Kinase G1 (PKG-I) localized presynaptically in nociceptor terminals.
evidence.source: Presynaptically Localized Cyclic GMP-Dependent Protein Kinase 1 Is a Key Determinant of Spinal Synaptic Potentiation and Pain Hypersensitivity

evidence.text: In Src-transformed cells, Tks5/Fish localizes to podosomes.
evidence.source: The adaptor protein Tks5/Fish is required for podosome formation and function, and for the protease-driven invasion of cancer cells.

evidence.text: Loss of zebrafish Vangl2 (in trilobite mutants) disrupts re-intercalation of daughter cells into the neuroepithelium.
evidence.source: Planar cell polarity signalling couples cell division and morphogenesis during neurulation

evidence.text: In phosphoenolpyruvate carboxykinase (PEPCK)-GFP mice, serial MPM found PEC-to-podocyte migration.
evidence.source: Tracking the fate of glomerular epithelial cells in vivo using serial multiphoton imaging in novel mouse models with fluorescent lineage tags

evidence.text: Tks5/Fish expression was detected in podosomes in invasive cancer cells.
evidence.source: The adaptor protein Tks5/Fish is required for podosome formation and function, and for the protease-driven invasion of cancer cells.

evidence.text: PKCζ deficiency promotes the plasticity necessary for cancer cells to reprogram their metabolism.
evidence.source: Control of Nutrient Stress-Induced Metabolic Reprogramming by PKCζ in Tumorigenesis

evidence.text: In podocin-confetti mice featuring cell-specific expression of CFP, GFP, YFP or RFP, the tracking revealed simultaneous migration of multiple podocytes.
evidence.source: Tracking the fate of glomerular epithelial cells in vivo using serial multiphoton imaging in novel mouse models with fluorescent lineage tags

evidence.text: Tks5/FISH is essential for podosome formation.
evidence.source: Sequential signals toward podosome formation in NIH-src cells

evidence.text: The augmentation of the N-WASP-Arp2/3 signal was accomplished on the platform of Tks5/FISH-Grb2 complex at focal adhesions.
evidence.source: Sequential signals toward podosome formation in NIH-src cells

evidence.text: Loss of zebrafish Vangl2 (in trilobite mutants) results in ectopic neural progenitor accumulations and NTDs.
evidence.source: Planar cell polarity signalling couples cell division and morphogenesis during neurulation

evidence.text: In phosphoenolpyruvate carboxykinase (PEPCK)-GFP mice, serial MPM found nanotubule connections.
evidence.source: Tracking the fate of glomerular epithelial cells in vivo using serial multiphoton imaging in novel mouse models with fluorescent lineage tags
